root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds a `!race` build tag to exclude `server/tidb_serial_test.go` from race builds. It does not include a concrete flaky-test failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix beyond skipping the test under `-race`.
